package rulefixtures

import (
	"net/http"
)

// scenario for init_side_effect: init() functions that perform network, file-system, or subprocess side effects.
// fixture polarity: positive; family: idioms; severity: info.
func scenario387Positive(url string) (*http.Response, error) {
	client := &http.Client{}
	return client.Get(url)
}
